headline: Is KKR’s (KKR) Deal Juggling Amid Liquidity Strains Reframing Its Private Markets Playbook?
summary: In recent days, KKR has reportedly joined the bidding for Pacific Equity Partners-owned UP Education, which could fetch more than A$1.00 billion, while also exploring a potential sale of liquid-cooling provider CoolIT Systems in a deal that may exceed US$3.00 billion. These moves come as KKR, having raised a record US$129.00 billion in 2025 and holding substantial dry powder, operates against a backdrop of growing liquidity concerns across the private credit market. We’ll now examine how...
